attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT ORDER_LINE_ID, ORDER_ID, LIST_PRICE, ACTIVE, BUNDLE_ADJ_LIST_PRICE, 
BUNDLE_DISC, BUNDLE_DISC_AMT, BUNDLE_ORIGINAL_LIST_PRICE, CONFIGURABLE_FLAG, 
DELIVERY_OPTION, CHARGE_TYPE, CONFIG_PATH, CREATED_BY, END_CUSTOMER_EMAIL, 
MLB_INDICATOR, PARENT_ORDER_LINE_ID, BUNDLE_OBJECT_ID, DESCRIPTION, EXT_LIST_PRICE, 
SOURCE_PRODUCT_TYPE, QUANTITY, CANCEL_REASON, LINE_NUMBER, LINE_TYPE, PART_CATEGORY,
QUOTE_LINE_ID, PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER, REFURBISHED_FLAG, ORIGINAL_LINE_SOURCE, 
SOURCE_LINE_ID, SOURCE_OBJECT_ID, UCSB_SOLUTION_ID, LINE_ORIGIN, PARENT_SOURCE_LINE_ID, 
MANDATORY_SERVICE_FLAG, FLEX_SERVICE_START_DATE, FLEX_SERVICE_STATUS, CONTRACT_NUMBER, 
ORIGINAL_CONTRACT_NUMBER, SERVICEABLE_FLAG, PRODUCT_HAS_SERVICE, PRODUCT_REQUIRE_SERVICE, 
INITIAL_TERM, DURATION, AUTO_RENEWAL_TERM, COVERED_PRODUCT_ITEM, PREPAY_TERM, PART_NUMBER, 
LICENSE_MODEL, OFFER_TYPE, PRICING_URL_NAME, TRUEUP_TERM, UNIT_OF_MEASUREMENT, USAGE_QUANTITY, 
SOFTWARE_LINE_STATUS, ACTION_TYPE, CHARGE_FREQUENCY, LINE_SUB_TYPE, PRICING_URL, CREATED_ON, SERVICE_START_DATE, 
UPDATED_ON,SERVICE_END_DATE ,KAFKA_CREATE_DATETIME , CXADMIN_CCOID, CXADMIN_FN, CXADMIN_LN, CXADMIN_EML
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_SI_CO_ORDER_LINE
WHERE UPDATED_ON > '$$LastExtractDate'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY ORDER_LINE_ID ORDER BY ORDER_LINE_ID, UPDATED_ON DESC ) = 1
